channel.title: Toys Index
channel.description: Latest public toys, games, docs, browser extensions, and experiments from toys.awwtools.com.

item.title: 2026-06-07-ascii-art-atelier---image-to-ascii
item.description: Browser-only image-to-ASCII converter with live settings, local processing, and text export.

item.title: 2026-06-02-highlight-mouse-pointer-bookmarklet
item.description: Bookmarklet that adds a visible pointer highlight for screen shares, walkthroughs, reviews, and recordings.

item.title: 2026-06-01-show-headers-bookmarklet
item.description: Bookmarklet that opens a floating heading navigator for long articles and documentation pages.

item.title: 2026-05-31-wild-forms-testing-examples
item.description: Local QA catalog of self-contained HTML extraction-test fixtures covering forms, custom controls, booking flows, read-only records, feeds, search, tables, complex layout, accessibility, hostile UI, and internationalization across 10 locales.

item.title: 2026-05-30-eye05-feature-graph-viz-v2
item.description: Interactive feature graph documenting eye05 product surfaces and runtime relationships.

item.title: 2026-05-24-codex-fully-agentic-nob.c-boilerplate-generator
item.description: Yep. Failed experiment. Fully agentic Codex project for a static nob.h/nob.c boilerplate generator with live code preview, validation, assumptions, and copy/download workflow.

item.title: 2026-05-23-codex-use-chatgpt-experiment-catnip-dash-game
item.description: Codex UI App calls ChatGPT with browser use

item.title: 2026-05-22-meeting-time
item.description: MeetTime - Animated Meeting Timeline

item.title: 2026-05-19-realdrawer-suite-single-shot-gpt-5.5
item.description: Real Drawer

item.title: 2026-05-06-bookmarklet-paint-brainstorming
item.description: Static showcase page for browsing, previewing, and comparing every Quick Sketch bookmarklet

item.title: 2026-05-05-bookmarklet-article-like-ai-wrote-it
item.description: Bookmarklet that replays any article's main content with AI-chat-style streaming effects — same text, no AI, fully reversible.

item.title: 2026-05-04-true-arbitrary-json-to-table-formatter-with-csv-export
item.description: Local-first JSON Table Inspector that turns JSON or JSONL into an inspectable table with search, filtering, failure diagnostics, and CSV/TSV export.

item.title: 2026-04-25-bookmarklet-ui-2
item.description: Updated bookmarklet UI framework demo with reusable floating window components and public theming tokens.

item.title: 2026-04-25-time-and-date-calculator-2-new-ui
item.description: Fixed-context date and time expression calculator with business-day, holiday, timezone, and formatting helpers.

item.title: 2026-04-25-Topic-Research-Notepad
item.description: Local-first research notepad with block editing, IndexedDB autosave, search, and exports.

item.title: 2026-04-19-c99-reference-II-with-programming-idioms
item.description: Offline C99 reference with a host embed contract for startup config, runtime messaging, theming tokens, snippet requests, and height reporting.

item.title: 2026-04-19-bookmarklet-ui
item.description: Bookmarklet-safe UI shell for floating tool windows on arbitrary web pages.

item.title: 2026-04-18-Ceetcode
item.description: Browser-native C99 problem-practice hub with deterministic harness tests and worker-based compile/run feedback.

item.title: 2026-04-12-Twitch-clone-for-testing
item.description: Single-page Twitch-like settings clone for UI automation and interaction testing.

item.title: 2026-04-12-Screenshot-bookmarklet
item.description: How to show custom mouse pointer when taking screenshot

item.title: 2026-04-11-Huge-Page-Object-Recorder-bookmarklet
item.description: Go SWD Page Recorder!

item.title: 2026-04-11-Leetcode-medium-catalog-with-playwright-exploratory-testing-scenarios
item.description: This project collects medium-difficulty LeetCode problems. It was created to test autonomous agent workflows with OpenAI Codex, using Playwright for exploratory and acceptance testing in a WSL environment.

item.title: 2026-03-27-Sharing-Goo
item.description: Fullscreen reservoir scene where dropped or pasted links float briefly and then sink over real elapsed time.

item.title: 2026-03-27-Sharing-Goo-Single-Shot-And-Codex
item.description: Single-page reservoir scene for dropping or pasting links into luminous goo with slow time-based sinking and ambient audio.

item.title: 2026-03-25-Quick-Vector-Image-Editor
item.description: Clipboard-first vector image editor for screenshot markup and lightweight composition.

item.title: 2026-03-23-Nintendo-Switch-2-Games
item.description: Curated Nintendo Switch board for games that support practice, creativity, movement, or calm routines.

item.title: 2026-03-23-Sticky-note-website
item.description: Sticky-note board website prototype for organizing reference content with search, filters, and previews.

item.title: 2026-02-25-GUID-Slot-Machine-Generator
item.description: Slot-machine-style GUID generator with animated reveal, speed controls, and copy action.

item.title: 2026-02-23-Unified_Canadian_Aboriginal_Syllabics-digital-rain
item.description: Interactive esolang-style digital rain playground controlled by syllabics glyph scripts.

item.title: 2026-02-22-paragraphs-as-social-media-posts-bookmarklet
item.description: Bookmarklet that reframes article paragraphs as social-style cards with local reactions and share links.

item.title: 2026-02-13-fancy-media-player
item.description: Audio-first local media player for large folder trees.

item.title: 2026-02-11-source-code-view-single-file-Code-Panorama-TreeSitter-WithSearch-Experiment1
item.description: Experimental Code Panorama build with search and Tree-sitter support.

item.title: 2026-02-08-time-and-date-calculator
item.description: Date/time expression calculator for deterministic date math.

item.title: 2026-02-01-NEW-2024-08-11-json-formatter
item.description: Updated branch of the JSON formatter and validator project.

item.title: 2026-02-01-middle-finger-boy
item.description: Semantic SVG character demo with interactive expression controls.

item.title: 2026-02-01-levenshtein-demo
item.description: Step-by-step visual explanation of Levenshtein distance.

item.title: 2026-01-30-useless-terminal
item.description: Minimal terminal parody focused on playful command interactions.

item.title: 2026-01-29-azure-role-playing-helper
item.description: CalmRBAC helper for planning Azure role assignments clearly.

item.title: 2026-01-24-todays-news
item.description: Simple news archive interface for browsing today-style updates.

item.title: 2026-01-23-c99-reference-II-with-programming-idioms
item.description: Expanded C99 reference with practical programming idioms.

item.title: 2026-01-20-c99-reference
item.description: Offline C99 reference for common library calls and patterns.

item.title: 2026-01-11-castle-css-codex-5.2-experiment-CSS
item.description: CSS experiment exploring a castle-themed visual language.

item.title: 2026-01-11-ui-library-demo-CSS-IMPORTANT
item.description: Demo page for testing a reusable bookmarklet UI component library.

item.title: 2026-01-05-ChatKGB
item.description: Fictional terminal-style chat experience with narrative flavor.

item.title: 2026-01-05-noita-cheatsheet
item.description: Quick reference for Noita alchemy materials and reactions.

item.title: 2026-01-02-image-magick-wasm-filters
item.description: ImageMagick WASM playground for applying filters fully in-browser.

item.description: Code Panorama with Tree-sitter and built-in project search.

item.description: Editor that auto-formats pasted content for cleaner text workflows.

item.description: Animated SVG cassette player concept with simple controls.

item.description: Code Panorama variant with Tree-sitter based structure parsing.

item.description: Bloom filter playground to learn tuning and false-positive tradeoffs.

item.description: Helper UI for composing FFmpeg commands and conversion steps.

item.description: Emoji-focused typewriter playground with Unicode controls.

item.description: Local notes app with chat-like flow and no backend dependency.

item.description: JSON quest/map editor for node graphs and branching paths.

item.description: Mechanical typewriter simulation with visual typing feel.
